# Vendored FFmpeg WebAssembly files

This directory contains runtime files copied from npm packages installed for this project.

## Package provenance

- `@ffmpeg/ffmpeg` version `0.12.15`
  - Source package metadata: `package.ffmpeg-ffmpeg.json`
  - License reported by package metadata: `MIT`
  - Repository reported by package metadata: `git+https://github.com/ffmpegwasm/ffmpeg.wasm.git`
- `@ffmpeg/core` version `0.12.10`
  - Source package metadata: `package.ffmpeg-core.json`
  - License reported by package metadata: `GPL-2.0-or-later`
  - Repository reported by package metadata: `git+https://github.com/ffmpegwasm/ffmpeg.wasm.git`

The installed package directories contained package metadata but no separate LICENSE or README files to copy. This file records only license/provenance information reported by the package metadata; it does not reproduce or invent license text.
